title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at TCI Express

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at TCI Express
jsonLd.description:
Join the TCI Express family as a Fleet Manager in Ranchi. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About TCI Express:
TCI Express is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with TCI Express!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
